mapping_metadata.analyzer: Senior Test Automation Mapping Specialist Agent

test_case_mappings.test_case_description: Test case to verify the Billing Cycle Period card display and behavior on Print and Payment History page when a subscription plan is paused, including verification of complimentary pages progress bar, additional pages tracking, tooltips, and page usage information display across different printing scenarios.

precondition_mapping.precondition_text: Enroll the Ink printer with 50 pages plan or higher.
precondition_mapping.notes: This batch contains YAML test case files for Instant Services (Shipment Tracking and Update Plan pages) and the main framework CLI module (aura.py). No printer enrollment methods, API helpers, or setup utilities were found. Printer enrollment functionality likely exists in other batches containing API helper modules or setup utilities.

precondition_mapping.precondition_text: Make sure the Subscription has no free months info.
precondition_mapping.notes: No subscription verification methods or API helpers found in this batch. This batch contains only YAML test definitions and framework orchestration code. Subscription state verification methods likely exist in API helper or backend utility modules in other batches.

precondition_mapping.precondition_text: Make sure the subscription is "subscribed" status.
precondition_mapping.notes: No subscription status verification methods found in this batch. The aura.py module provides framework configuration and orchestration but no subscription management functionality. Subscription status methods likely exist in API helper modules in other batches.

precondition_mapping.precondition_text: Click the Pause Plan button on CIT modal or "Pause Instant Ink" link to trigger the pause plan.
precondition_mapping.notes: This batch contains YAML test cases for Shipment Tracking and Update Plan pages, not for pause plan functionality. No page objects, locators, or methods for CIT modal or Pause Instant Ink link were found. These components likely exist in batches containing HP Instant Ink dashboard or plan management page objects.

test_case_mappings.no_match_reason:
Test case C44873414 requires automation components for the HP Instant Ink Print and Payment History page, specifically for testing the Billing Cycle Period card with pause plan functionality. This includes page objects for PrintAndPaymentHistoryPage, locators for billing cycle card elements (progress bars, tooltips, info icons, value displays), action methods for navigation and interaction, verification methods for progress bar colors and text values, and API helpers for time manipulation and print job simulation. 

This batch (batch 5) contains:
1. Four YAML test case definition files (TC31266486, TC31266491, TC31266518, TC31409312) that test DIFFERENT pages - specifically Instant Services Shipment Tracking page and Update Plan page. These YAML files define test flows for verifying page layouts and content but do NOT contain reusable Python page objects, locators, or methods. They are test definitions, not implementation code.
2. One Python module (aura.py) which is the main CLI entry point and orchestrator for the AURA framework. This module provides framework infrastructure including command-line argument parsing, configuration building, flow orchestration, and YAML test execution. It contains utility functions for framework setup but NO page objects, NO UI element locators, NO page interaction methods, and NO verification methods for any HP Instant Ink pages.

The YAML test cases in this batch test completely different functionality (Shipment Tracking and Update Plan pages) than what test case C44873414 requires (Print and Payment History page with Billing Cycle Period card). The aura.py module provides framework-level utilities (parse_args, build_flow_args, parse_requirements, add_flow, process_yaml) but these are infrastructure functions, not UI automation components.

None of the files in this batch contain:
- Page objects for Print and Payment History page
- Locators for billing cycle card, progress bars, tooltips, or info icons
- Methods for verifying progress bar colors, text values, or page usage
- Methods for scrolling, hovering, or interacting with billing cycle elements
- API helpers for time manipulation or print job simulation
- Methods for navigating to Print and Payment History page
- Verification methods for plan pause information display

The relevant components for test case C44873414 likely exist in other batches that contain:
- HP Instant Ink page object modules (e.g., print_payment_history_page.py, instant_ink_dashboard_page.py)
- API helper modules for subscription management and print simulation
- Utility modules for time manipulation and backend operations
- Verification helper modules for visual validation and progress bar checks

This is expected and normal - not every batch will contain relevant components for every test case. The merge process will consolidate findings across all 18 batches to identify which components exist and which need to be created.
